number_theory.name: mathd_numbertheory_48
number_theory.statement:
theorem mathd_numbertheory_48
  (b : ℕ)
  (h₀ : 0 < b)
  (h₁ : 3 * b^2 + 2 * b + 1 = 57) :
  b = 4 :=

number_theory.name: mathd_numbertheory_109
number_theory.statement:
theorem mathd_numbertheory_109
  (v : ℕ → ℕ)
  (h₀ : ∀ n, v n = 2 * n - 1) :
  (∑ k in finset.Icc 1 100, v k) % 7 = 4 :=

number_theory.name: mathd_numbertheory_37
tactics: let e : empty → fin 1 → ℕ := λ _, 1,

number_theory.name: numbertheory_prmdvsneqnsqmodpeq0
number_theory.statement:
theorem numbertheory_prmdvsneqnsqmodpeq0
  (n : ℤ)
  (p : ℕ)
  (h₀ : nat.prime p) :
  ↑p ∣ n ↔ (n^2) % p = 0 :=
tactics: simp [nat.dvd_prime_pow (show nat.prime p, from h₀), pow_succ],

competition_aime.name: aime_1984_p1
competition_aime.statement:
theorem aime_1984_p1
  (u : ℕ → ℚ)
  (h₀ : ∀ n, u (n + 1) = u n + 1)
  (h₁ : ∑ k in finset.range 98, u k.succ = 137) :
  ∑ k in finset.range 49, u (2 * k.succ) = 93 :=
tactics: have h₂ : ∀ k, k ∈ finset.range 49 → u (2 * k + 1 + 1) = u (2 * k + 1) + 1 :=
by { intros k hk, exact h₀ (2 * k + 1) },
have h₃: ∑ (x : ℕ) in finset.range 49, (1:ℚ) = 49 := by simp only [mul_one, nat.cast_bit0, finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul, nat.cast_bit1, finset.card_range, nat.cast_one],
rw [h98, sum_pairs, finset.sum_add_distrib, finset.sum_congr rfl h₂,

competition_aime.name: aime_1984_p15
tactics: revert x y z w h₀ h₁ h₂ h₃,
intros x y z w h,

competition_aime.name: aime_1983_p9
competition_aime.statement:
theorem aime_1983_p9
  (x : ℝ)
  (h₀ : 0 < x ∧ x < real.pi) :
  12 ≤ ((9 * (x^2 * (real.sin x)^2)) + 4) / (x * real.sin x) :=

competition_amc.name: amc12a_2002_p6
competition_amc.statement:
theorem amc12a_2002_p6
  (n : ℕ)
  (h₀ : 0 < n) :
  ∃ m, (m > n ∧ ∃ p, m * p ≤ m + p) :=

competition_amc.name: amc12_2000_p6
competition_amc.statement:
theorem amc12_2000_p6
  (p q : ℕ)
  (h₀ : nat.prime p ∧ nat.prime q)
  (h₁ : 4 ≤ p ∧ p ≤ 18)
  (h₂ : 4 ≤ q ∧ q ≤ 18) :
  ↑p * ↑q - (↑p + ↑q) ≠ (194:ℤ) :=
tactics: revert p q h₀ h₁ h₂,

competition_amc.name: amc12_2000_p5
competition_amc.statement:
theorem amc12_2000_p5
  (x p : ℝ)
  (h₀ : x < 2)
  (h₁ : abs (x - 2) = p) :
  x - p = 2 - 2 * p :=

competition_amc.name: amc12b_2002_p6
competition_amc.statement:
theorem amc12b_2002_p6
  (a b : ℝ)
  (h₀ : a ≠ 0 ∧ b ≠ 0)
  (h₁ : ∀ x, x^2 + a * x + b = (x - a) * (x - b)) :
  a = 1 ∧ b = -2 :=

competition_amc.name: amc12_2001_p2
competition_amc.statement:
theorem amc12_2001_p2
  (a b n : ℕ)
  (h₀ : 1 ≤ a ∧ a ≤ 9)
  (h₁ : 0 ≤ b ∧ b ≤ 9)
  (h₂ : n = 10 * a + b)
  (h₃ : n = a * b + a + b) :
  b = 9 :=

competition_amc.name: amc12_2000_p11
competition_amc.statement:
theorem amc12_2000_p11
  (a b : ℝ)
  (h₀ : a ≠ 0 ∧ b ≠ 0)
  (h₁ : a * b = a - b) :
  a / b + b / a - a * b = 2 :=

competition_amc.name: amc12b_2003_p9
competition_amc.statement:
theorem amc12b_2003_p9
  (a b : ℝ)
  (f : ℝ → ℝ)
  (h₀ : ∀ x, f x = a * x + b)
  (h₁ : f 6 - f 2 = 12) :
  f 12 - f 2 = 30 :=

general.name: induction_12dvd4expnp1p20
tactics: have dvd_of_dvd_add_mul_left : ∀ (a b n : ℕ), a ∣ b + a * n → a ∣ b :=

general.name: induction_nfactltnexpnm1ngt3
general.statement:
theorem induction_nfactltnexpnm1ngt3
  (n : ℕ)
  (h₀ : 3 ≤ n) :
  n! < n^(n - 1) :=
tactics: induction h₀ with k h₀ IH,
have k_ge_one : 1 ≤ k := le_trans dec_trivial h₀,

general.name: induction_sumkexp3eqsumksq
general.statement:
theorem induction_sumkexp3eqsumksq
  (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k in finset.range n, k^3 = (∑ k in finset.range n, k)^2 :=

general.name: induction_pprime_pdvdapowpma
general.statement:
theorem induction_pprime_pdvdapowpma
  (p a : ℕ)
  (h₀ : 0 < a)
  (h₁ : nat.prime p) :
  p ∣ (a^p - a) :=

general.name: induction_ineq_nsqlefactn
general.statement:
theorem induction_ineq_nsqlefactn
  (n : ℕ)
  (h₀ : 4 ≤ n) :
  n^2 ≤ n! :=
